## Source: amazon-inspector (f0aee4818420709f0d12c4a32c97671628fffdb1255fefd1895b2c3f880f8b2b)
The package playgod was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (a700663ab039dd35fa24734d883219fff845bb0c6017a5e0dcb0191dfa4676b0)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'playgod' @ 1.1.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
